title: duchesnea indica var. typica
intro: Duchesnea indica var. typica, commonly known as Indian strawberry or wood sorrel, is a perennial plant belonging to the rose family (Rosaceae). It is a medicinal plant that has been used to treat various health conditions due to its rich antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Duchesnea indica var. typica include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and act as an antiseptic agent. The plant can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or salve, and is also used in traditional herbal medicine for its therapeutic properties.
